name: openmm-lj13-baselines-v1
description: Baseline comparison suite for the raw LJ13 global-search benchmark under matched budgets. Compares the default Bayesian optimizer against a random-search baseline across multiple seeds.
paper_hypothesis: On the raw LJ13 global-search benchmark, the Bayesian optimizer should achieve lower energy gaps than a simple random-search baseline under the same run budget and search space.

evaluation.reference_note: Accepted reduced-unit LJ13 global minimum energy, used here to compare optimizer baselines under identical budgets.
baseline_notes: Compare mean best gap across baseline groups rather than a single run.
Keep max_runs, batch_size, and search-space bounds fixed across optimizer variants.
Report both best gap and success rate of reaching low-gap basins across seeds.
